highlights.headline: Toronto Raptors vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Toronto Raptors vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Toronto Raptors vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Immanuel Quickley hit a 3-pointer from the top of the key at the buzzer and the Toronto Raptors rallied from a 10-point deficit in the fourth quarter to beat the Charlotte Hornets 97-96 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Quickley's 3-pointer at the buzzer sends the Raptors past the Hornets 97-96 for 5th win in 6 games

headlines.description: — Isaiah Stewart scored a career-high 31 points to help the short-handed Detroit Pistons beat the Chicago Bulls 108-93 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stewart scores career-high 31 points to lead short-handed Pistons past Bulls, 108-93

highlights.description: Washington Wizards vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Washington Wizards vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Joel Embiid scored 28 points, Paul George added 23 and all of Philadelphia's starters scored in double-figures as the 76ers beat the Washington Wizards 131-110 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Embiid, George lead 76ers to a 131-110 win over Wizards, who acquire Trae Young in trade with Hawks

highlights.headline: Denver Nuggets vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Denver Nuggets vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Denver Nuggets vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2026/01/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jamal Murray had 22 points and 17 assists and Peyton Watson scored 30 for the Denver Nuggets, who went on a 14-0 run to rally from a fourth-quarter deficit and pull away to beat the Boston Celtics 114-110 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray scores 22 with 17 assists to help Nuggets win 114-110 and snap Celtics 5-game win streak

headlines.shortLinkText: Hawks roll to 117-110 victory over Pelicans as word of Trae Young-to-Wizards trade breaks

events.name: LA Clippers at New York Knicks

highlights.headline: Knicks come alive in 2nd half to snap losing streak
highlights.description: Jalen Brunson leads all scorers with 26 points as the Knicks knock off the Clippers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks come alive in 2nd half to snap losing streak) 2026/01/08 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns had 20 points, 11 rebounds and a season-high seven assists, Jalen Brunson scored 26 points and the New York Knicks snapped their four-game losing streak with a 123-111 victory over the Los Angeles Clippers on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Towns bounces back with strong game as the Knicks beat the Clippers 123-111 to snap a 4-game skid

video.headline: Knicks come alive in 2nd half to snap losing streak

highlights.description: Dillon Brooks leads the way with 21 points as the Suns defeat the Grizzlies.

headlines.shortLinkText: Former Memphis players Dillon Brooks and Grayson Allen star in the Suns' romp over the Grizzlies

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 46 points and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 129-125 in overtime Wednesday night to snap a two-game losing skid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 46 points as Thunder halt rare skid with OT win over Jazz

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at San Antonio Spurs

headlines.description: — Keldon Johnson had 27 points, Victor Wembanyama added 16 points and 14 rebounds, and the San Antonio Spurs overcame 38 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists from Luka Doncic to beat the Los Angeles Lakers 107-91 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Johnson and Wembanyama fuel Spurs to win over Lakers 107-91, despite Doncic's 38 points

headlines.description: — Deni Avdija had a season-high 41 points and the Portland Trail Blazers won their fourth straight with a wild 103-102 victory over the Houston Rockets on Wednesday night.
